title: lotus corniculatus subsp. tenuis
intro: Lotus corniculatus subsp. tenuis, also known as narrow-leaved birdsfoot trefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lotus corniculatus subsp. tenuis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
